farm-fresh-poached-eggs.name: Farm-fresh Poached Eggs

ingredients.item: Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Fill a wide pan with 4 cups water (about 3 inches deep) and bring to a boil over high heat.
Once the water boils, turn the heat down to just below a simmer (there should be no bubbles).
Crack eggs open into a ramekin.
Transfer eggs into a soup ladle, and working quickly and gently, angle your soup ladle so the eggs slip into the water.
Set a timer for 3 minutes.
After 3 minutes, use a slotted spoon to lift your eggs from the water, one at a time.
Give each a little jiggle to check that the whites are set.
If not, dip back in for 30 seconds more.
Remove and serve immediately with salt and pepper.
Your yolk should run when pierced with a fork.

farro-with-wild-mushrooms-and-herbs.name: Farro With Wild Mushrooms And Herbs

ingredients.item: (about 8 oz.) assorted fresh mushrooms (such as chanterelle
ingredients.prep: porcini, lobster, maitake, and crimini), cut into 1” pieces

instructions: Cook farro in boiling salted water until tender, about 20 minutes. Drain, let cool, and set aside. DO AHEAD: Farro can be made 2 days ahead. Cover and chill.

Heat 2 Tbsp. oil in a large heavy skillet over medium-high heat until it shimmers (the oil needs to be very hot to crisp the mushrooms). Working in batches, and adding more oil if needed, place a single layer of mushrooms in skillet. Cook, turning once, until crisp and cooked through, 4–5 minutes. Transfer to a plate; season with salt and pepper.

Bring broth to a simmer in a medium saucepan over medium heat. Add farro and cook, stirring often, until heated through. Season farro with salt and pepper. Add butter and stir vigorously to combine and create a creamy texture. Add mushrooms, parsley, chives, and thyme; stir just to evenly incorporate. Serve immediately.

fettuccine-cacio-e-pepe-recipe-comedera.name: Fettuccine Cacio E Pepe Recipe
fettuccine-cacio-e-pepe-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de fettuccine cacio e pepe
instructions: He steals his dough with a pint of seawater and follows his packaging instructions till his dente remains.
Once ready, let them slip. Reserve a cup of water where she steamed the double.
Mix that cup of water with the pecorino till they integrate.
Warm up a pint with olive oil and add the pepper, mix very well.
Remove the frying bread from the fire and pour water with the pecorino Carefully.
Mix very well and with agility to form a salsa.
Once ready, add the dough and integrate to make it well impregnated and creamy.
Serve the double and come with more pecorino.

fig-cake.name: Fig Cake
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Coat a 12-cup fluted tube pan (such as Bundt) with cooking spray.
Beat sugar and eggs in a large bowl with an electric mixer until sugar dissolves; stir in oil. Add milk; mix well.
Combine flour, cinnamon, baking soda, and salt in a separate bowl; beat into egg mixture until blended. Fold in fig preserves and pecan pieces until incorporated. Pour batter into the prepared pan.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into center comes out clean, about 1 hour. Cool in the pan for 10 minutes, then invert onto a wire rack to cool completely before slicing.

fig-goat-cheese-and-prosciutto-crostini.name: Fig, Goat Cheese, And Prosciutto Crostini
instructions: Preheat oven to 191°C.
Slice 12 ½-inch slices of bread from the baguette. Place on a baking sheet, and brush generously with the olive oil. Sprinkle a little salt if desired on each slice.
Bake for about 10 mins, or until crisp and slightly golden. Remove from oven and cool slightly.
Spread goat cheese on each crostini. Spread about a tablespoon of Bonne Maman Fig Preserves on top of the goat cheese.
Fold the slices of prosciutto neatly and place on top of each crostini.
Lay fresh arugula leaves on top of each crostini to taste.

fish-and-chips-argiro.name: Fish And Chips
instructions: Place the cod fillets on parchment paper in a small baking pan.
Salt them and refrigerate for 20′ to freeze and dry the fish.
Clean the potatoes and cut them into slices with one centimetre thick.
Each slice is cut into spades.
Place them in a bowl of water.
When we cut them all, rinse them in clean water to leave all the starch.
In a pot with salted water boiling and in medium heat, add the potatoes and boil until they start to burst and soften slightly for a few minutes.
We put them with a drill spoon on a sheet lined with non-stick paper.
Add the potatoes to a layer so that they do not step on top of each other.
Allow them to cool and place them in the freezer to tighten.
They usually fry potatoes in animal fat. But we'll fry them in olive oil.
Fry in hot oil for 6′ at 150 °C.
Put the potatoes on a baking pan and after they cool for 10′, fry them at 180°C until they become crispy and rosy.
Finally, remove them on absorbent paper and serve with salt flower
Place the rice flour, flour and salt in a baking pan and sift in a bowl.
Add the beer and a shot of vodka. The vodka will make the turd extra crispy.
Remove the skin from the fish and cut it into pieces.
Remove any bones.
Add 3-4 tablespoons of flour to a deep dish.
Salt and bake the fillets.
Shake off the excess flour.
We dip the floured fish in the turquoise.
Make sure to cover the whole fillet with turquoise and keep each piece of fish to drain the unnecessary turquoise.
Fry in a lot of hot oil until it is well browned and turn over the fish to brown on the other side.
Remove the fish into absorbent paper to drain.
In a bowl, add all the chopped ingredients and mix with the mayonnaise.
Freeze the sauce for a while and serve with fish and chips on parchment paper!

flaunas-argiro.name: Flaunas
instructions: Rub all the cheeses in a grater in a bowl.
Add the eggs, herbs, raisins, baking and semolina.
Leave out the mint and baking.
Ferment the materials until homogenized.
Cover the filling and refrigerate.

The filling must be tight and the semolina must collect all figure from cheeses and eggs. Therefore, when it is time to fill, if the filling is too soft and sticks to the hands we will sprinkle with some flower to make it.
When the filling is frozen and it is time to fill the flowers, add the finely chopped mint, baking powder and knead again.
Form the filling into 16 cheese balls and set aside.

flounder-fish-teleculinaria.name: Flounder Fish
instructions: Place the plaice in a pot, add cold water until it is well covered, season with a little salt and bring it to the heat until boiling. Turn off the fire and let the plaice cool in the water. Then drain it, wipe it clean of skin and spines and finely shred it. Book the cooking water.
Cut the bread into pieces, throw them in a bowl and water them with fish water, previously passed by a strainer.
Peel the onion and garlic teeth, pick them up and throw them in a pot. Add the olive oil, take it to the fire and let it cook until the onion is golden. Add the chopped tomatoes and stir well.

Slightly drain the bread with your hands, add it to the pot, stir well and let it boil, stirring always. Add clean plaice, beaten egg and chopped coriander, season with salt and pepper and wrap. Serve real hot.

fluffy-pancakes.name: Fluffy Pancakes

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or 1 tsp. morton kosher salt
Whole milk or full-fat nondairy milk

instructions: Whisk 2 cups (250 g) all-purpose flour, ¼ cup (50 g) granulated sugar, 2 Tbsp. aluminum-free baking powder, and 1½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or 1 tsp. Morton kosher salt in large bowl until well combined, about 30 seconds.

Whisk 6 Tbsp. unsalted butter, melted and slightly cooled, 2 large eggs, and 2 cups whole milk or full-fat nondairy milk in a medium bowl until well combined (butter may form tiny clumps, especially if milk is still cold). Pour milk mixture into dry ingredients and whisk until just combined and no large, dry pockets of flour remain (batter may be thin and lumpy; it’ll be fine). Let batter sit at room temperature until noticeably puffy and thick, about 10 minutes.

Place a dry large nonstick griddle or skillet over medium heat (if using an electric griddle, heat to 325°). Stir batter gently to deflate any large air bubbles. Working in batches, scoop ¼-cupfuls of batter onto griddle. Cook pancakes until golden brown underneath and matte around edges and bubbles have formed on top, about 3 minutes. Flip and cook until golden brown on other side, about 2 minutes. Transfer pancakes to plates (or keep warm on a wire rack set inside a baking sheet in a 250° oven up to 30 minutes).
Serve pancakes with lots of butter and pure maple syrup.

Serve pancakes with lots of softened butter and pure maple syrup.
Editor’s note: This easy pancake recipe was first printed online in December 2022 and has since been updated to address reader concerns about the amount of leavening and salt. For those mornings when pancakes are out of the question, check out our best make-ahead breakfast ideas →

french-apple-cake-or-the-34-recipe.name: French Apple Cake (or The 3/4 Recipe)
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Butter a 9-inch springform pan.
Combine sugar, eggs, and vanilla extract in a bowl; beat with an electric mixer until smooth. Mix in rum. Mix in 1/2 of the butter.
Combine flour, baking powder, and salt together in a separate bowl. Add 1/2 of the flour mixture to the egg mixture; mix well. Mix in remaining butter and flour. Fold in apples.
Scrape batter into the prepared pan. Smooth the top gently.
Bake in the preheated oven until top is golden brown and a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean, 50 to 60 minutes.

french-onion-soup-with-port-wine.name: French Onion Soup With Port Wine
instructions: Melt butter with olive oil in a large pot over medium-low heat. Add onions and garlic; season with a pinch of salt and black pepper. Cook onion mixture in hot butter-oil until caramelized, stirring every 10 minutes to keep from browning too quickly, about 1 hour.

Stir brown sugar and thyme into caramelized onions; allow sugar to melt into onions, about 2 minutes. Pour in wine and bring to a boil while scraping the browned bits of food off of the bottom of the pan with a wooden spoon; continue simmering for 5 more minutes. Pour in beef stock; cook for 10 more minutes. Season soup with salt and pepper.
Preheat the oven's broiler to high. Place 5 oven-safe crocks onto a baking sheet.
Ladle soup evenly into the crocks. Top each with a French bread slice; cover with a Swiss cheese slice and sprinkle with Parmagiano-Reggiano cheese.
Cook soups under the preheated broiler until cheese is melted and browned, 2 to 3 minutes.

french-pastry-pie-crust.name: French Pastry Pie Crust
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, salt, and sugar. Mix well, then cut in shortening until mixture resembles coarse meal.

In a small bowl, combine egg, vinegar, and 4 tablespoons of water. Whisk together, then add gradually to flour mixture, stirring with a fork. Mix until dough forms a ball. Add one more tablespoon of water if necessary.
Allow dough to rest in refrigerator 10 minutes before rolling out.

french-toast-with-egg-jam-teleculinaria.name: French Toast With Egg Jam

ingredients.item: 16 slices of bread like fuck (or bread shaped)

instructions: Light a pot with the water, sugar, cinnamon stick and lemon peel. Let it boil for 5 minutes, remove the lemon peel and cinnamon stick and reserve.
Slightly beat the yolks and pass them to a pot, through a network pusher. Add the previous syrup, mix well and bring it to the fire, always stirring until thicken. Remove and reserve.
On the other hand, beat the clears into a very firm castle. Water the slices of bread with warm milk, drain them and pass through the clear beats. Fry them in warm, abundant oil until they're golden.
Remove them and pour them on absorbent paper. Then pass them by sugar and cinnamon, previously mixed. Serve them watered with egg candy.

fresh-cherry-muffins.name: Fresh Cherry Muffins

ingredients.item: Fresh pitted and quartered sweet cherries

instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C). Line a 12-cup muffin tin with paper liners.
Mix flour, 3/4 cup sugar, baking powder, and salt together in a bowl.

Whisk oil, milk, egg, and almond extract together in a small bowl; pour into flour mixture and gently stir until incorporated. Fold in cherries. Spoon batter into the prepared muffin cups, filling each 2/3 full. Sprinkle remaining sugar over top.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean, about 20 minutes. Transfer to a wire rack to cool.

fresh-salad-teleculinaria.name: Fresh Salad
instructions: Peel the carrots and grate them; peel the apple, peel and cut into small cubes. Water the apple with the lemon juice so it doesn't oxidize.
In a bowl, put the apple, the grated carrot, the nuts, the raisins and the mayonnaise. Season with salt and pepper and wrap it all around.
Have the lettuce leaves on serving plates. Have above the previous preparation, decorate with canons and take to the cold until serving.
